response.justification: The candidate has strong full-stack experience and demonstrates deep technical curiosity, but lacks focused C++ and industrial automation domain expertise; while they have some C++ exposure from NI LabWindows and a bachelor’s thesis, it's buried among dominant JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang work, and there's no evidence of SDL, IEC 62443, MQTT, or industrial protocols required for the role.
strengths: Demonstrated ability to build high-performance, event-driven systems (DLang, async I/O)
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentoring via workshops and code katas
Proven cross-stack adaptability and ownership across web, embedded, and DevOps environments
concerns: Minimal recent or substantial C++/STL/OOP production experience compared to core role requirements
No visible experience with industrial cybersecurity standards (IEC 62443), MQTT, or automation protocols
Primary tech stack is JavaScript/TypeScript/DLang, with C++ appearing only as historical or academic
